facts.title: The Beatles Record
facts.description: The Beatles have sold over 600 million records worldwide, making them the best-selling music artist of all time.

facts.title: Spotify's First Song
facts.description: The first song ever played on Spotify was Radical Face's 'Welcome Home'.

facts.title: Mozart's Genius
facts.description: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart composed over 600 musical pieces during his lifetime, starting at age 5.

facts.title: Grammy Record
facts.description: Beyoncé holds the record for the most Grammy Awards won by any artist, with 32 awards.

facts.title: Music Heals
facts.description: Studies show that listening to music can reduce anxiety, lower blood pressure, and improve mood.

facts.title: Shortest Song
facts.description: The shortest song on Spotify is 'Stay Alive' by Pearl Jam at only 3 seconds long.

facts.title: Vinyl Revival
facts.description: Vinyl records are making a comeback, with sales increasing year over year among music fans.

facts.title: Music Memory
facts.description: Your brain releases dopamine when you listen to music you love, which is why songs can create strong memories.
